name: codex-skin-studio
description: Extract reference elements, generate visual assets, and safely apply a complete Codex desktop skin.

interface.shortDescription: Build a complete Codex skin through a gated local workflow.
interface.longDescription: Extract visual evidence from local references, plan every asset prompt, generate a coordinated hero and icon atlas, compile a constrained skin bundle, and stage a reversible restart.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $build-codex-skin to turn my attached images into a complete Codex skin.
